subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily, a servant from among Thy servants hath implored another servant from among Thy servants, and a soul from amidst Thy loved ones hath earnestly besought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد تضرع عبد من عبادک الی عبد من عبادک و ابتهل نفس من احبائک الی
